compounddef.title: USB Type-C Port Controller API
compounddef.innergroup: USB Type-C Port Controller Driver Backend API

briefdescription.para: CC status changed.
Power status changed.
Receive Buffer register changed.
Received Hard Reset message.
SOP* message transmission not successful.
Reset or SOP* message transmission not sent due to an incoming receive message.
Reset or SOP* message transmission successful.
A high-voltage alarm has occurred.
A low-voltage alarm has occurred.
A fault has occurred.
TCPC RX buffer has overflowed.
The TCPC in Attached.SNK state has detected a sink disconnect.
Receive buffer register changed.
Extended status changed.
An extended interrupt event has occurred.
A vendor defined alert has been detected.
TCPC Alert bits.
The Alert register.
The CC Status register.
The Power Status register.
The Fault Status register.
The Extended Status register.
The Extended Alert Status register.
The Vendor Defined Status register.
TCPC Status register.

memberdef.definition: typedef int(* tcpc_vconn_control_cb_t) (const struct device *tcpc_dev, const struct device *usbc_dev, enum tc_cc_polarity pol, bool enable)
memberdef.argsstring: )(const struct device *tcpc_dev, const struct device *usbc_dev, enum tc_cc_polarity pol, bool enable)
memberdef.name: tcpc_vconn_control_cb_t

briefdescription.para: Callback type for VCONN control.

parameterdescription.para: CC polarity indicating which CC line carries VCONN
VCONN is enabled when true, disabled when false

memberdef.definition: typedef int(* tcpc_vconn_discharge_cb_t) (const struct device *tcpc_dev, const struct device *usbc_dev, enum tc_cc_polarity pol, bool enable)
memberdef.argsstring: )(const struct device *tcpc_dev, const struct device *usbc_dev, enum tc_cc_polarity pol, bool enable)
memberdef.name: tcpc_vconn_discharge_cb_t

briefdescription.para: Callback type for discharging VCONN.

parameterdescription.para: CC polarity indicating which CC line carries VCONN
VCONN discharge is enabled when true, disabled when false

memberdef.definition: typedef void(* tcpc_alert_handler_cb_t) (const struct device *dev, void *data, enum tcpc_alert alert)
memberdef.argsstring: )(const struct device *dev, void *data, enum tcpc_alert alert)
memberdef.name: tcpc_alert_handler_cb_t

briefdescription.para: Callback type for handling TCPC alert events.

parameterdescription.para: User data passed when registering the callback via tcpc_set_alert_handler_cb
The alert type that was triggered

briefdescription.para: Returns whether the sink has detected a Rp resistor on the other side.
Returns true if both CC lines are completely open.
Returns true if we detect the port partner is a snk debug accessory.
Returns true if we detect the port partner is a src debug accessory.
Returns true if the port partner is an audio accessory.
Returns true if the port partner is presenting at least one Rd.
Returns true if the port partner is presenting Rd on only one CC line.
Initializes the TCPC.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, enum tc_cc_voltage_state *cc1, enum tc_cc_voltage_state *cc2)
memberdef.name: tcpc_get_cc

briefdescription.para: Reads the status of the CC lines.

parameterdescription.para: A pointer where the CC1 status is written
A pointer where the CC2 status is written

briefdescription.para: Sets the value of CC pull up resistor used when operating as a Source.
Gets the value of the CC pull up resistor used when operating as a Source.

parameterdescription.para: pointer where the value of the Pull-Up Resistor is stored

briefdescription.para: Sets the CC pull resistor and sets the role as either Source or Sink.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, tcpc_vconn_control_cb_t vconn_cb, const struct device *usbc_dev)
memberdef.name: tcpc_set_vconn_cb

briefdescription.para: Sets a callback that can enable or disable VCONN if the TCPC is unable to or the system is configured in a way that does not use the VCONN control capabilities of the TCPC.

detaileddescription.para: The callback is called in the tcpc_set_vconn function if vconn_cb isn't NULL

parameterdescription.para: pointer to the callback function that controls vconn

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, tcpc_vconn_discharge_cb_t cb, const struct device *usbc_dev)
memberdef.name: tcpc_set_vconn_discharge_cb

briefdescription.para: Sets a callback that can enable or discharge VCONN if the TCPC is unable to or the system is configured in a way that does not use the VCONN control capabilities of the TCPC.

detaileddescription.para: The callback is called in the tcpc_vconn_discharge function if cb isn't NULL

parameterdescription.para: pointer to the callback function that discharges vconn

briefdescription.para: Discharges VCONN.

detaileddescription.para: This function uses the TCPC to discharge VCONN if possible or calls the callback function set by tcpc_set_vconn_cb

parameterdescription.para: VCONN discharge is enabled when true, it's disabled

briefdescription.para: Enables or disables VCONN.

detaileddescription.para: This function uses the TCPC to measure VCONN if possible or calls the callback function set by tcpc_set_vconn_cb

parameterdescription.para: VCONN is enabled when true, it's disabled

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, enum tc_power_role power_role, enum tc_data_role data_role)
memberdef.name: tcpc_set_roles

briefdescription.para: Sets the Power and Data Role of the PD message header.

detaileddescription.para: This function only needs to be called once per data / power role change

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the Power Delivery message from the TCPC.

detaileddescription.para: If buf is NULL, then only the status is returned, where 0 means there is a message pending and -ENODATA means there is no pending message.

parameterdescription.para: pointer where the pd_buf pointer is written, NULL if only checking the status
or equal to 0 is the number of bytes received if buf parameter is provided
if there is a message pending and buf parameter is NULL

briefdescription.para: Enables the reception of SOP* message types.

parameterdescription.para: Enable Power Delivery when true, else it's disabled

briefdescription.para: Sets the polarity of the CC lines.
Transmits a Power Delivery message.
Dump a set of TCPC registers.
Sets the alert function that's called when an interrupt is triggered due to an alert bit.

detaileddescription.para: Calling this function enables the particular alert bit

parameterdescription.para: The callback function called when the bit is set
user data passed to the callback

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, enum tcpc_status_reg reg, uint32_t *status)
memberdef.name: tcpc_get_status_register

briefdescription.para: Gets a status register.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer where the status is stored

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, enum tcpc_status_reg reg, uint32_t mask)
memberdef.name: tcpc_clear_status_register

briefdescription.para: Clears a TCPC status register.

parameterdescription.para: A bit mask of the status register to clear. A status bit is cleared when it's set to 1.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, enum tcpc_status_reg reg, uint32_t mask)
memberdef.name: tcpc_mask_status_register

briefdescription.para: Sets the mask of a TCPC status register.

parameterdescription.para: A bit mask of the status register to mask. The status bit is masked if it's 0, else it's unmasked.

briefdescription.para: Manual control of TCPC DebugAccessory control.

parameterdescription.para: Enable Debug Accessory when true, else it's disabled

briefdescription.para: Detach from a debug connection.
Enable TCPC auto dual role toggle.

parameterdescription.para: Auto dual role toggle is active when true, else it's disabled

briefdescription.para: Queries the current sinking state of the TCPC.
Set the VBUS sinking state of the TCPC.

parameterdescription.para: True if sinking should be enabled, false if disabled

briefdescription.para: Queries the current sourcing state of the TCPC.
Set the VBUS sourcing state of the TCPC.

parameterdescription.para: True if sourcing should be enabled, false if disabled

briefdescription.para: Controls the BIST Mode of the TCPC.

detaileddescription.para: It disables RX alerts while the mode is active.

parameterdescription.para: The TCPC enters BIST TEST Mode when true

briefdescription.para: Gets the TCPC firmware version.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to TCPC chip info where the version is stored

briefdescription.para: Instructs the TCPC to enter or exit low power mode.

parameterdescription.para: The TCPC enters low power mode when true, else it exits it

briefdescription.para: Enables the reception of SOP Prime and optionally SOP Double Prime messages.

parameterdescription.para: Can receive SOP Prime messages and SOP Double Prime messages when true, else it can not

briefdescription.para: USB Type-C Port Controller API.
